headline: Adobe (ADBE) Launches Brand Visibility Solution to Optimize Digital Channels for AI Discovery Surfaces
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the cheap AI stocks to buy according to analysts. On April 20, Adobe announced a brand visibility solution, expanding Adobe Experience Manager/AEM with a contextual layer designed to optimize digital channels for both humans and AI discovery surfaces. This initiative addresses the massive 269% year-over-year increase in AI-driven traffic […]
